cells.value: DDG-51 hull -> yard -> FY build schedule
SCN LI 2122 resource summary - AP + EOQ + TOA bridge ($M, FY27 PB; P-1/P-10 view)
AP/LLTM TAM-base derivation (Phase 3): CY AP x ship-construction share x supplier coeff
real; FY22-24 lumped in 'Prior Years' (lower bound). Gross all-periods = the Total col above
x ship-construction share = non-GFE AP base
strips AWS EOQ / Other GFE (Inputs knob, 0.80)
x AP/LLTM supplier coeff = AP/LLTM stream TAM
the AP/LLTM stream in portfolio TAM (knob 0.85)
Line-level classification (DDG P-10 structure) - what's in / out of the AP base
WPN/OPN appropriation; not SCN ship construction
moved GFE -> Basic Construction in FY23 (no re-add)
The Ship-Construction vs AWS/Other-GFE split is an editable assumption (Inputs knob): the P-10
line-items don't parse cleanly from the budget-book PDFs. Gross CY AP / EOQ shown above for calibration.
No double-count: the P-5c BC line is already net of prior-yr AP (the FY26 BC anomaly $282.6M vs CY AP
$1,750M confirms they are complementary), so CY AP is additive to BC. PY-AP-credit in TAM (Normalized Budget) = 0.
